name: grant_sandbox_connection
description: Owner-only. Grant a teammate viewer/editor access to this sandbox. Prefer `copass_id` (e.g. 'alice' or '@alice'); only fall back to `user_id` if a UUID is explicitly given. Returns `connection_id`. Follow up with `spawn_connection_api_key` to give the grantee programmatic access. Auto-stamps `@<handle>` into the audit `label` when minted by handle, so the historical handle survives the grantee renaming.

copass_id.description: Preferred. Handle like 'alice' or '@alice'. Server normalizes.

user_id.description: UUID — only if you already have it (rare in conversation).

project_id.description: Optional. Scope grant to one project; default = whole sandbox.

label.description: Optional audit label. Auto-stamped to '@<handle>' when copass_id is supplied and label is omitted.

expires_at.description: Optional ISO 8601 expiry. Default: never expires.
